institutions.description: Policies that apply across all institutions (typically set manually)

guidelines.description: Place guideline PDFs in subdirectories organized by panel or topic

teams.description: Departmental team standards and reference documents

notes.setup: 1. Copy this file to config/institutions.json and customize for your organization. 2. Update INSTITUTION_CONFIG in packages/shared/src/constants.ts to match. 3. Update the Institution enum in packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma if adding new institutions.
notes.colors: Colors are used for institution badges and toggle controls in the chat UI.
notes.sourceFolder: Each institution's sourceFolder should match a directory at the project root containing policy PDFs.
